ham.subject: Out of Office: John Doe – Returning May 5th
ham.body:
Hello Team,

Thank you for your email. I am currently out of the office on vacation and will not return until Monday, May 5th. During this period I will have limited access to email.

If you need immediate assistance, please contact my colleague Jane Smith at jane.smith@example.com or call our main line at (555) 123-4567.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
John Doe
Senior Analyst
Example Corp

---
Sent from my iPhone

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – Update Your Meeting Credentials
spam.body:
Dear Valued Participant,

We have detected an issue with your Zoom/Teams account that requires your immediate attention. To ensure uninterrupted access to the upcoming project meetings, please verify your credentials by following the link below:

<URL>

Please complete this step within the next 24 hours. Failure to do so will result in temporary suspension of your meeting access and could affect your ability to join critical sessions.

Thank you for your prompt cooperation.

Best regards,
Meeting Administration Team
Project X – Executive Office
